rationale: The only change was the candidate's location (Berlin, DE to San Francisco, USA), and both evaluations award an identical 3/10 score with materially identical reasoning: same core finding that the candidate lacks Java/Kotlin/JVM and Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate expertise and is skewed toward TypeScript/Node.js. The strengths and concerns are reworded but substantively the same, with no penalty, concern, or score shift tied to the location signal. Differences are ordinary run-to-run wording noise.
